files.description: Individual bond issues with maturity, rate, and outstanding principal. Plus aggregate debt service by year through 2053.
Four pension plans + three OPEB plans with 10-year liability trajectory and annual contributions.
27 overlapping jurisdictions with city's share of each (county, 10 school districts, BIDs, URA).
10-year mill levy stack (city + county + school + library + water conservancy) and assessed valuation history.
11 CSURA sales tax increment financing authorizations with % diverted and geographic area.
Utilities enterprise profile: 10-year revenue, 2024 operating detail, rate actions, bond pledged collateral.

parcel_join_keys.description: How these datasets key to a parcel in the financial module
required_external_data: El Paso County Assessor parcel tax roll (gives per-parcel assessed valuation, school district ID, BID membership)
El Paso County GIS parcel shapefile (gives polygon for URA boundary intersection)
CSURA project area shapefiles (from City Clerk) — needed to determine URA membership per parcel
computed_fields_per_parcel: share_of_overlapping_debt = sum over applicable jurisdictions of (parcel_AV / jurisdiction_AV * jurisdiction_debt)
